headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Deal? Not So Fast, Says Tehran 🛑🤝
text: Tehran 🕌 says talks with Uncle Sam 🇺🇸 went PRETTY FAR 🏃‍♂️📏 but a SIGNED SEALED DELIVERED 📜✍️ deal ain't IMMINENT 🚫⏳! Foreign Ministry SPOKESMAN Esmail Baqai 🗣️ dropped the REAL TEA ☕: 'We NAILED a BIG CHUNK 🧱🍰 of the issues but calling it a DONE DEAL 🍆✅? Nobody can claim that!' US SecState Marco Rubio 🍊🕴️ had folks BUZZING 🐝 in Delhi 🪔 saying 'maybe MONDAY MAGIC ✨ today' but then hit the brakes 🛑 'don't read TOO MUCH into it' 🤷‍♂️ – Iran took their sweet time 📵 replying like ghosts 👻 on read! CBS 🍒 spilling that Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei 🕋 (who got BANGED UP 💥 by Israeli strikes that also took his DAD) is HIDING 🕵️‍♂️ in some SECRET SPOT 🕳️ making comms with envoys a SLOW DANCE 💃🐢! The MOOT deal is a 60-DAY CEASEFIRE EXTENSION 🗓️🕊️, reopening the JUICY Strait of Hormuz 🌊🛢️ (20% of world OIL 🍯 and LNG passing like it's a HIGHWAY 🚚💨), plus more nuclear chit-chat ☢️🗣️ – but the THORNIEST BITS like SANCTIONS RELIEF 💸🚫, FROZEN FUNDS 💎❄️, and nukes are LEFT FOR LATER 📅! Oil prices TANKED 📉 like a bad crypto coin while Asian stocks MOONED 🚀📈 on HOPEFUL VIBES 😌! Trump's GOP fam SPLIT like banana splits 🍌🍨 – Ted Cruz called it a DISASTROUS MISTAKE 💣😱, Roger Wicker said 60 days means 'Operation Epic Fury' was for NAUGHT 🫥, Lindsey Graham wondered why the war started if Iran stays a REGIONAL BOSS 👑🌍! Trump clapped back 👏 calling critics 'LOSERS' 🥴 and promised 'GREAT DEAL or NO DEAL' 💯❌! Even if signed ✍️, shipping won't be BACK TO NORMAL 🛳️🔄 for MONTHS according to Lars Jensen of Vespucci Maritime – industry stays CAUTIOUS like a cat 🐱 on hot tin! Trump already BLOCKING Iranian ports 🚢🚫 till it's CERTIFIED ✅! Iran swears their nuke program is PEACEFUL 🕊️☢️ and might even HAND OVER enriched uranium 💼⚛️ (440kg at 60% purity, one step from WEAPONS GRADE 💣). Masoud Pezeshkian told state TV 'we're NOT after a BOMB' 🚫💥! All in all, it's a SLOW BURN 🔥 not a FAST & FURIOUS 🚗💨 – stay tuned for the next episode of Middle East SOAP OPERA 📺🌍!
